COMM LYONS, DPADILLA,REPORTER, JWILLIS-MCGHEE, CLERK 3:18PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, ARNOLD EVJE ATTY FOR PLTF, ANTOINETTE YOUNG DEFT IN PRO PER; CASE SETTLED TERMS READ INTO RECORD; JUDGMT FOR THE PLTF & AGAINST DEFT FOR IMMED POSSESSION OF THE PRE- MISES LOCATED AT 45 BROSNAN ST, #7, SF,CA; BUT STYD TO 11/6/97 WHEREBY DEFT TO PAY PLTF AT THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS THE SUM OF $895. IN THE FORM OF A CASHIER CHECK OR MONEY ORDER; DEFT IS TO PAY PLTF THE SUM OF $301.44 STARTING 12/1/97 AND CONTINUING THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH UNTIL FULLY PAID AND TO BE PAID NO LATER THAN THE 5TH OF EACH MONTH; IF DEFT MAKES ALL PAYMTS, PLTF TO FILE A DISM W/PREJ; PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TALMAGE, O. A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG, ANTIONETTE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 45 BROSNAN ST. #7, S.F. $2,745.00 RENT, $650.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $113.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,508.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EVICTION WOULD BE CANCELLED IF DEFT HAD PAID $895- DIRECTLY TO PLTF ON OR BEFORE 5PM 11/6/97 AND PAID THE BALANCE OF $2,713- IN INSTALLMENTS AT $301.44 PER MONTH STARTING 12/1/97. NO FURTHER STAYS.
